scripts.test:e2e:latency: node scripts/run-e2e-latency.mjs -- tests/e2e-response-time.spec.ts tests/public-blog-pagination.spec.ts tests/public-works-pagination.spec.ts tests/public-works-search.spec.ts tests/admin-blog-ai-dialog.spec.ts tests/admin-pages-settings.spec.ts --grep "response time:|latency budget|works search|AI fix dialog|admin can update" --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:manual-auth: PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://localhost PLAYWRIGHT_E2E_PROFILE=optional PLAYWRIGHT_MANUAL_AUTH=1 PLAYWRIGHT_HEADED=1 playwright test tests/manual-auth.spec.ts --headed --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:public: PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://localhost playwright test tests/home.spec.ts tests/introduction.spec.ts tests/public-content.spec.ts tests/public-detail-pages.spec.ts tests/public-edge-nav.spec.ts tests/public-layout-stability.spec.ts tests/public-works-pagination.spec.ts tests/public-blog-pagination.spec.ts tests/public-work-videos.spec.ts tests/resume.spec.ts --workers=1

scripts.test:e2e:works: PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://localhost playwright test tests/admin-work-publish.spec.ts tests/admin-work-edit.spec.ts tests/admin-work-validation.spec.ts tests/admin-work-special-input.spec.ts tests/admin-work-image-upload.spec.ts tests/admin-work-auto-thumbnail.spec.ts tests/admin-work-video-create-flow.spec.ts tests/admin-work-video-edit-flow.spec.ts tests/admin-work-video-mixed-flow.spec.ts tests/public-work-detail-inline-edit.spec.ts tests/public-work-videos.spec.ts tests/public-works-pagination.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:blog: PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://localhost playwright test tests/admin-blog-publish.spec.ts tests/admin-blog-edit.spec.ts tests/admin-blog-validation.spec.ts tests/admin-blog-image-upload.spec.ts tests/admin-blog-image-validation.spec.ts tests/public-blog-detail-inline-edit.spec.ts tests/public-blog-pagination.spec.ts --workers=1

scripts.test:coverage:m3: vitest run src/test/api-base.test.ts src/test/auth-login-url.test.ts src/test/auth-csrf.test.ts src/test/responsive-page-size.test.ts src/test/server-api.test.ts src/test/public-api-clients.test.ts src/test/public-api-contracts.test.ts src/test/page-editor.test.ts src/test/admin-dashboard-collections.test.ts src/test/ui-primitives.test.tsx --coverage --coverage.clean=true --coverage.reporter=json-summary --coverage.reporter=text-summary
